narrative.description: Konami's multidirectional tunnel shooter traps the player inside an alien nest, requiring 360-degree targeting while rescuing humanoids and clearing parasite waves in claustrophobic vector-style arenas.
narrative.core_loop: Rotate to face threats from any direction, rescue floating humanoids, destroy the parasite core, and advance through nested alien chambers.

mechanics.map_notes: Threats attack from foreground and background layers requiring depth-aware aiming.
mechanics.expression: Threats attack from foreground and background layers requiring depth-aware aiming.

mechanics.map_notes: Humanoids must be retrieved before the parasite timer expires.
mechanics.expression: Humanoids must be retrieved before the parasite timer expires.

mechanics.map_notes: Nested chambers clear sequentially with escalating parasite swarms.
mechanics.expression: Nested chambers clear sequentially with escalating parasite swarms.

mechanics.map_notes: Omni-laser fires immediately in the facing direction.
mechanics.expression: Omni-laser fires immediately in the facing direction.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship energy depletes from parasite contact and fire.
mechanics.expression: Ship energy depletes from parasite contact and fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Bonus ships at score thresholds extend the run.
mechanics.expression: Bonus ships at score thresholds extend the run.

mechanics.map_notes: Parasites emit radial bullet bursts from all angles.
mechanics.expression: Parasites emit radial bullet bursts from all angles.

mechanics.map_notes: Core enemies pulse before releasing spawn waves.
mechanics.expression: Core enemies pulse before releasing spawn waves.

mechanics.map_notes: Chamber guardians cycle predictable orbit-and-fire loops.
mechanics.expression: Chamber guardians cycle predictable orbit-and-fire loops.

mechanics.map_notes: Tunnel walls compress safe rotation space.
mechanics.expression: Tunnel walls compress safe rotation space.

mechanics.map_notes: Final parasite core shifts between spawn and direct assault phases.
mechanics.expression: Final parasite core shifts between spawn and direct assault phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship rotates independently to track threats from any bearing.
mechanics.expression: Ship rotates independently to track threats from any bearing.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Juno First through its core shooter loop.
